data.title: Interactive Brokers now accepts stablecoins for account funding, allowing clients to deposit USDC which converts to USD automatically.
data.description: Interactive Brokers, a leading electronic brokerage firm, recently announced that its clients now have the option to deposit USDC, a stablecoin pegged to the US dollar. This newly-introduced feature allows clients to seamlessly convert their USDC to US dollars for funding their accounts. This initiative provides users with a convenient and efficient way to manage their finances within the platform.

data.title: ADA forecast: Short-term target $0.42, medium-term $0.38-$0.44, breakout at $0.42, critical support at $0.38.
data.description: Predictions for the ADA price are as follows: a short-term target within one week is $0.42, while the medium-term forecast over one month falls within the range of $0.38 to $0.44. A bullish breakout is expected at the $0.42 mark, with critical support seen at $0.38.

data.title: HiTHIUM's Chongqing factory named the world's first Lighthouse Factory for energy storage batteries by WEF.
data.description: Recently, the World Economic Forum unveiled the newest additions to its Global Lighthouse Networks 2026, including the Chongqing manufacturing base of HiTHIUM in China. This factory has been recognized as the world's pioneer Lighthouse Factory for its innovative practices. This achievement underscores the prestigious status of the manufacturing base among global peers and serves as a testament to its cutting-edge approach in the industry.

data.title: XRP aims for $2.16 breakout; Short-term target $2.12-$2.16; Medium-term forecast $1.95-$2.25; Critical support $2.01.
data.description: According to recent analysis, XRP is predicted to reach a short-term target of $2.12-$2.16 within a week and a medium-term forecast range of $1.95-$2.25 within a month. The bullish breakout level is estimated to be at $2.16, while critical support is seen at $2.01. These projections indicate potential price movements for XRP in the upcoming periods.

data.title: US homebuilder to roll out crypto rewards program for renters after SEC approval, offering rewards for paying rent with token.
data.description: A new initiative by Megatel Homes will allow renters to earn rewards by paying their rent with a crypto token. Renters who participate in the program stand to benefit from incentives for utilizing this payment method.

data.title: BW LPG Limited reports Q4 2025 Product Services segment gross profit of $27 million, including $12 million from transactions.
data.description: In Singapore, BW LPG Limited ("BW LPG") announced an update on BW Product Services' performance in Q4 2025. BW Product Services recorded a gross profit of around USD 27 million for the quarter ending on December 31, 2025. This profit includes a realized gain of USD 12 million from various cargo, freight, and hedging transactions. The segment showed positive unrealized gains as well. BW LPG is listed under BWLPG.OL on the Oslo Stock Exchange and BWLP on the New York Stock Exchange.

data.title: State Street launches tools for tokenizing assets like money market funds, ETFs, deposits, stablecoins for its clients.
data.description: State Street recently announced the launch of a cutting-edge cryptocurrency platform aimed at assisting clients in the creation of various tokenized financial products. The platform will facilitate the development of tokenized money market funds, exchange-traded funds, as well as products like tokenized deposits and stablecoins. This move is expected to revolutionize the financial industry and provide clients with innovative opportunities in the crypto space.

data.description: Binance Coin is currently trading at $933, showing a neutral Relative Strength Index (RSI) and facing resistance at $956. Based on technical analysis, experts predict that BNB could potentially reach a range of $950 to $1,050 by February 2026 after indicating bullish breakout signals.

data.title: BridgeBio Pharma, Inc. prices $550 million in convertible senior notes due 2033 to repay previous notes due 2027.
data.description: On January 15, 2026, BridgeBio Pharma, Inc., a biopharmaceutical company in Palo Alto, California, specializing in genetic diseases, revealed the pricing details of their private offering. They announced the pricing of $550 million in total of 0.75% convertible senior notes due 2033. This offering was exclusive to qualified institutional buyers under Rule 144A of the Securities Act of 1933. Additionally, the Company allowed initial purchasers the option to buy up to an extra $82.5 million in notes. The closing of this transaction is anticipated to take place on January 21, 2026, pending the fulfillment of standard closing requirements.
